case_title: DAVIS, MARJORIE et al VS BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. CA5-701-16-01 et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA CORP.  CA5-701-16-01

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DAVIS, MARJORIE DAVIS, RUSSELL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.  CA5-701-16-01 BANK OF AMERICA CORP.  CA5-701-16-01 $2,957.20 PRINCIPAL, $295.72 INTEREST, $70.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,322.92, DEFENDANT HAD NO AUTHORITY TO DISBURSE PLAINTIFF'S FUNDS ON A MERE ALLEGATION OF WRONGDOING. DEFENDANT HAD NO AUTHORITY TO TAKE SEPARATE PROPERTY FUNDS OF PLAINTIFF'S SPOUSE CLAIMING TO DO SO FOR OVERDRAFT, WHEN THERE WAS NO OVERDRAFT CREATED BY PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PLTFF'S REQUEST FOR AN ORDERED CONTINUANCE ON 6/24 /04 (THURS)AT 3:30PM (CAL:20-1);PD.$10 CASH;FOLDER UTL,TO TRAY.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.  CA5-701-16-01 BANK OF AMERICA CORP.  CA5-701-16-01

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,957.20 FILED BY DAVIS, MARJORIE DAVIS, RUSSELL AS TO DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.  CA5-701-16-01 BANK OF AMERICA CORP.  CA5-701-16-01 ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-04-2004 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUN-04-2004, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUN-24-2004 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 ORDER GRANTED.
